videos.title: Mark of the Ninja Remastered Part 1 - Stealth Ninja Walkthrough (Urdu/Hindi)
videos.description:
Mark of the Ninja Remastered gameplay walkthrough Part 1 — this is one of the best 2D stealth games ever made, and we're playing it fully in Urdu/Hindi commentary. Sneak, hide, and take down guards as a nameless ninja marked with a cursed tattoo.

Klei Entertainment's stealth classic (originally 2012, remastered 2018) follows a nameless ninja on a mission to avenge his clan, the Hisomu, against Count Karajan. The Mark of the Ninja tattoo grants superhuman senses — but slowly drives him insane. In this series we'll go level by level, stealth-killing, avoiding detection, and unlocking every gadget along the way.

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Intro
1:21 Ink And Dreams
18:00 Breaching the Parameter
33:25 The Trail of Shadow
 
FULL PLAYLIST:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZb5JJ3Go6bY

ABOUT THIS CHANNEL:
Let's plays and full walkthroughs of hit and underrated games, commentary in Urdu/Hindi. New parts posted regularly — subscribe to follow the full Mark of the Ninja series.

#MarkOfTheNinja #MarkOfTheNinjaRemastered #StealthGame #UrduHindiGaming #Gaming

Part 5 picks up right after the WLF capture in Part 4. We recover, find a new trap mine to set against enemies, weave through explosive traps, spot Tommy's horse, and finally push to the TV station where things take a turn — setting up a possible new infected type next episode.

videos.title: Joel and Ellie: He'd Burn the World Down for Her | TLOU Shorts
videos.description:
Joel and Ellie's bond is the heart of The Last of Us — and Joel breaks every rule to keep her safe. 🔥❤️

He wasn't a hero. He wasn't a saint. But when it came to protecting Ellie, no line was uncrossable — every enemy who got close paid for it.

What started as one mission became something bigger: Ellie is the daughter he never got to keep, and Joel is the father figure she never had. The moment she's threatened, the odds stop mattering.

Drop a ❤️ if Joel would do the same for you.

More Last of Us clips, walkthroughs, and let's plays every week on this channel.

#TheLastOfUs #JoelAndEllie #TLOUShorts

videos.title: The Last of Us Part 1 - Left Behind DLC Full Gameplay Walkthrough (Ellie's Story)
videos.description:
The Last of Us Part 1 Left Behind DLC gameplay — full walkthrough of Ellie and Riley's story, from the abandoned mall to the infected-filled finale. No cuts, no skips, just the ride.

Left Behind fills in what happened to Ellie before she met Joel on the road — and it hits different watching it as an adult let's play. This full playthrough covers both timelines: present-day Ellie protecting a wounded Joel, and the flashback to her last days with Riley before everything fell apart. If you loved the last of us part 1 and want the complete left behind dlc walkthrough with real reactions, this is it.

videos.title: The Last of Us Part 1 Urdu Ep 10 | David Ne Ellie Ko Pakad Liya!
videos.description:
The Last of Us Part 1 Urdu mein Part 10 — Ellie David ke haath giraftar! Joel zakhmi lekin Ellie ko dhundne nikal para...

Is episode mein Ellie Joel ke liye khaana dhoondne nikli thi jab David ke bandoo ne use ghera liya. David ke woh log jo Joel ne pehle maar diye the, ab Ellie se badla lena chahte hain — lekin woh sirf ek bachchi hai, isliye jaan se nahi maarte. David use qaid kar leta hai aur dosti ka natak shuru karta hai. Magar Ellie smart hai — woh David ki sachchi niyat bhaanp leti hai. Woh bhagna chahti hai, David use jalti hui jagah mein band kar deta hai. Ellie apni jaan bachane ke liye David se ladti hai. Udhar Joel neend se jaag kar, zakhmi hone ke bawajood, Ellie ki talaash mein nikal jaata hai.

videos.title: 007 First Light True Ending — She Was Working Against Us The Whole Time
videos.description:
007 First Light Ending — Damian's final stand, Isola's betrayal fully revealed, and Bond officially becomes 007. Series finale.

⏱ Timestamps:
0:00 007 First Light Ending: Intro & Full Series Context
3:00 HYPERION Chamber: Sir Nicholas Webb Final Confrontation
9:00 Isola's Betrayal Revealed (She Was Working Against Us the Whole Time)
16:30 Bond Destroys the Supercomputer
18:00 MI6 Captivity: The “For England” Chapter Begins
26:00 Reaching the Red Phone — M's Orders
40:00 Finding Moneypenny — Damian Strikes Back
1:00:00 Final Boss: Damian in the Indestructible Suit
1:20:30 Bond Becomes 007 — True Ending (007 First Light Series Finale)

The 007 First Light ending delivers on everything the series built toward. This is Part 8 — the series finale — picking up right where Part 7 left off: inside the HYPERION chamber, seconds from death, with Webb's entire AI robot army at our backs.

Then Isola shoots Webb. Not to save us. She wanted the supercomputer for her own client all along — the betrayal was never impulsive, it was always the plan. Bond discovers the truth, destroys the machine, and both end up locked inside the MI6 Facility.

That's where the final chapter begins: For England. Bond must reach the red phone to contact M, track down Moneypenny — who Damian stabs before escaping with the second supercomputer — and face Damian in the 007 First Light final boss fight. Damian's fully upgraded with an indestructible suit. Bond wins the fight but loses the machine.

Isola quietly takes it for her client. M offers the rank of 001. Bond turns it down. The 7th recruit chooses 007.

Full 007 First Light walkthrough — Parts 1 through 8. Commentary in Urdu / Hindi / English.

FULL PLAYLIST (Parts 1–8):
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLeAiEgaC_uTBtO3dRbBdVRYEQ6xzjEP52

Watch Part 7 first if you haven't:
https://youtu.be/wbZPknVrX7c

ABOUT THIS CHANNEL:
AfterOfficeLife — gaming walkthroughs and playthroughs with commentary in Urdu, Hindi, and English. Subscribe for the full series.

💬 Which moment hit harder — Isola's betrayal or Bond turning down 001? Comment below.

#007FirstLight #JamesBondGame #007FirstLightEnding

After escaping the Marble Mill and defeating Damian, we push deep into Webb Industries HQ — and discover Webb's whole operation is run by AI-powered robots with one mission: kill us.

videos.title: 007 First Light Part 6 — Bond FRAMED as Terrorist | THEIA Truth Exposed
videos.description:
007 First Light Part 6 — Bond uncovers the full THEIA conspiracy and Webb Industries frames him as a TERRORIST to bury it. James Bond Vietnam mission gameplay.

  Is episode mein Bond aur Greenway Webb ka pura raaz kholte hain, magar Webb ke connections itne gehre hain ke poora MI6 operation band ho jaata hai. Bond ko Vietnam bhaagna parta hai — wahan Damian ke haathon se 3 logon ko bachane ke liye. (English below ⬇️)

  Webb Industries has been framing innocent people every time THEIA makes a mistake — keeping MI6 in the dark. Bond and Greenway expose it. Webb tries to kill them, they escape — but Webb's connections reach deep into MI6. He threatens the agency directly, gets Bond and Greenway declared terrorists, and forces the entire MI6 operation to shut down.

  Bond flees to Vietnam. THEIA's past mistakes left three targets marked for death — Webb's son Damian has orders to execute all three. Bond races to save them, gets ambushed, captured by Damian, and tied to a marble slab with a grinder slowly closing in. Pure Bond. He escapes, Greenway jumps in, and the fight spills into the marble mine.

  TIMESTAMPS:
  0:00 Intro / Previously On
  6:12 THEIA Conspiracy Fully Exposed
  11:23 Webb Attacks — The Escape
  30:07 Bond & Greenway Declared Terrorists
  40:08 Chapter 8: Time to die
  52:48 Racing to Save 3 Targets
  01:12:13 Ambushed by Damian's Men
  01:29:50 The Marble Slab Trap
  01:35:50 Greenway's Rescue & Marble Mine Fight

videos.title: Ellie & Riley Get Bitten — The Last of Us Left Behind DLC
videos.description:
Ellie and Riley get bitten by zombies in the Last of Us Left Behind DLC — one of the most heartbreaking moments in gaming.

Two best friends. One impossible fate. Instead of giving up, they chose to spend their last moments together. The Last of Us Left Behind DLC showed us that Ellie's story started long before Joel — and this is why it hurts so much.

#TheLastOfUs #LeftBehind #Ellie #Riley #Gaming

videos.title: 007 First Light Part 5 Hindi/Urdu — Bond Breaks Damian Free & Infiltrates Webb HQ
videos.description:
007 First Light Part 5 Hindi Urdu walkthrough — Bond frees Damian from Isola's captivity and infiltrates Sir Nicholas Webb's headquarters. Webb's full secret is about to unravel.

Full 007 First Light gameplay walkthrough in Hindi and Urdu. In Part 5, Bond breaks Damian free from Isola's prison, stops an assassination attempt on Greenway, then infiltrates Webb Industries headquarters to reach the mainframe. IO Interactive's James Bond origin story hits peak tension — every loyalist around Bond is compromised and Webb's conspiracy is almost fully exposed.

Puri kahaani Hindi/Urdu mein: Damian ki qaid se azaadi ke baad Bond aur Isola Webb Industries ki building mein dakhil hote hain. Greenway ko bachana tha — aur mainframe tak pahunchna tha. Har scene mein nayi pech, aur Webb ka raaz abhi bhi chupaaya hai. Subscribe karein aur bell on karein taake Part 6 miss na ho.

videos.title: The Last of Us Urdu Part 6 – Bill Se Battery Mili, Phir Hunter Ka Hamla!
videos.description:
The Last of Us Part 1 Urdu Walkthrough Part 6 – Battery ki talash, Bill ki madad, aur phir hunters ka ghera!

  Joel, Ellie aur Bill milikar ek working car dhoondhne nikalte hain — Tommy tak pohonchne ke liye.
  Shehar dangerous hai, magar Bill jaanta hai kya karna hai. Gari milti hai, battery bhi —
  magar wapsi itni aasaan nahi hogi.

  Is part mein The Last of Us ka tense Bill's Town sequence complete hota hai jab hunters
  ghata band kar dete hain. Poori scene-by-scene Urdu commentary ke saath, koi cheez skip nahi.

  TIMESTAMPS:
  0:00 Recap aur Shuruat — Pichle Part Ka Aakhri Scene
  10:00 Shehar Mein Ghusna — Battery Ki Talash
  35:00 Bill Ki Madad — Gari Aur Battery Milti Hai
  55:00 Gari Chalti Hai — Tommy Ki Taraf Rawana
  1:10:00 Hunters Ka Hamla — Intense Ambush Scene

  Pichla Part (Part 5): https://youtu.be/_VbBs7uuS4w

  🔔 Subscribe karo — Part 7 mein Tommy milega.
  👇 Comment mein batao: Bill trusted tha ya sirf faaydemand?

videos.title: Wolverine Game's Rage System Is INSANE - State of Play Breakdown
videos.description:
Wolverine game gameplay just dropped at State of Play — the Rage system, Jean Grey, and brutal combat are on another level.

  Insomniac built a 3-tier Rage mechanic for Logan: normal attacks build Rage, Tier 3 triggers a Black/White/Blood monochromatic mode straight from the comics. Jean Grey, Mystique, and Sabretooth all confirmed. The Reavers serve as the primary enemy faction — cybernetic mercenaries hunting mutants.

  Marvel's Wolverine launches September 15, 2026 on PS5. Pre-orders available now.

  Subscribe for daily gaming Shorts.

  ---

  Source: Marvel's Wolverine Extended Gameplay Reveal | PlayStation State of Play
  https://youtu.be/OiBo_NgYI5Q

  #wolverinegame #wolverine #marvel #ps5 #gaming
